titleStmt.title: SII 15.667: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 667. (B.K. No. 94 of 1926-27.) MUḶGUND, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab built into a wall inside the Chandranātha basti.
This is dated Śaka 1343, Plava, Bhādrapada śu. 9, Friday, corresponding to 1421 A.D., September 5, Friday, f.d.t. °14.

It records the death of Nāgarasa, son of Sēnabōva, Heggaḍe Maduvarasa who was a minister and Bāhattara-niyōgādhipati of Tiḷakarasa of Soraṭūr. The earlie portion, in Sanskrit, records the death by the vow of sannyāsa of Amṛita, disciple of Bhaṭṭārakadēva of Balātkāra-gaṇa. The details of the date of the latter's death are the same as those given above but without the Śaka year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatparamagaṁbhīraśyādvādāvō
ghalāṁcchanaṁ . jīyātrailōkyanātha
sya śāsanaṁ jinaśa(śā)sanaṁ . © yōghīṁ
draṁ sākṣānmadanasadṛśārūpavibhavēṁdraṁ
sphuratītyārāntyā nirupama Iti khyāti
mamaṁ bhajati samagraḥ sadvidyaiḥ sarasa
caritaiḥ saumyavadanaḥ sukhināṁ dhaurē
yaḥ kavijananutō mādarasayituḥ . tasya
rājñaḥ samagraḥ(gra)sya vaibhavasya ca kāraṇaḥ
pradhāna saṁpadaṁ prāptō dēvarājēti
nāmabhāku(k) . śrī balātkāragaṇa śrī
bhaṭṭārakadēvara priyaguḍḍa plava saṁ
vacchara bhādrapada śuddha navami śu
kravārē cāmṛtākhyōyaṁ saṁnya
sēna divaṁgataḥ . svastiśrī śakavaruṣa
1343 ne plava saṁvatsarada bhādrapada
śuddha navami sukravāradalu śrīmat
tsvaraṭā(ṭū)ra tiḷakarasara bhujādō
rddaṁḍa sanmadana śrīmanmahāpradha(dhā)
naṁ bahattaraniyōgādhipati niyō
gayōgaṁdharā maṁtritilakanumappa
heggaḍe sēnabōva maduvarasana maga nā
garasanu svarggakke saṁdanu maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.667 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
